case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY VS. CLAUDIA LEWIS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, CLAUDIA $806.97 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $806.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, CLAUDIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO COSTS, PLAINTIFF IS EXEMPT FROM COURT FEES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
